targets.rawSql:
SELECT severity, count(*) AS cases
FROM risk_cases
WHERE status IN ('candidate', 'investigating', 'watch', 'confirmed', 'needs_human_review')
GROUP BY severity
ORDER BY
  CASE severity
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
    WHEN 'high' THEN 2
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 3
    WHEN 'low' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END;

SELECT case_key, title, risk_type, severity, status, risk_score, confidence, updated_at
FROM risk_cases
WHERE status IN ('candidate', 'investigating', 'watch', 'confirmed', 'needs_human_review')
ORDER BY risk_score DESC, confidence DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT severity, status, count(*) AS alerts, max(last_emitted_at) AS latest_alert_at
FROM risk_alerts
WHERE last_emitted_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY severity, status
ORDER BY latest_alert_at DESC;

SELECT case_key, title, risk_type, severity, risk_score, confidence, updated_at
FROM risk_cases
WHERE status = 'needs_human_review'
  OR (severity IN ('critical', 'high') AND confidence < 0.80)
ORDER BY severity, risk_score DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
